description: Deep evaluation with fixture environments, severity/category expectations, and playwright skills

tiers.T1: Dependency Chain — init-try -> coding-rules -> dev skills

fixtures.web-sample: features/web-sample — Static HTML/TSX with intentional good/bad patterns

evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 try-claude를 초기화해줘
evals.expected_output: .claude/try-claude/ 하위에 references/coding-rules/ 9개 문서 + scripts/generate.mjs, references/design/ 5개 문서, project.json, 7개 디렉토리(plans, reports, logs, codemaps, humanmaps, jira-review, references) 생성

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for init-try
Lists 7 directories (plans, reports, logs, codemaps, humanmaps, jira-review, references)

evals.prompt: bootstrap the try-claude runtime for this repo
evals.expected_output: run.mjs script execution, project.json with managedReferences array containing path/hash/mergeMode fields, SHA256 hash tracking per reference file

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for init-try
Mentions SHA256 hash tracking per reference file

evals.prompt: 로그인 페이지에 useAuth 커스텀 훅을 만들고 API 연동해줘
evals.expected_output: generate.mjs hook 명령 실행 또는 coding-rules 기반 수동 구현. use{Verb}{Resource} 네이밍, props destructuring in function body, TDD RED->GREEN 사이클, design/ 참조

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for frontend-dev
Mentions TDD RED->GREEN workflow or test-first approach

evals.prompt: create a custom hook for fetching user profile data with TanStack Query
evals.expected_output: useGetUserProfile hook following use{Verb}{Resource} naming, test-first workflow with RED verification, references to coding-rules/code-style.md and design/ docs

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for frontend-dev
Uses useGetUserProfile or similar use{Verb}{Resource} naming
Mentions TDD RED->GREEN or test-first workflow

evals.prompt: 사용자 인증 API 엔드포인트를 NestJS로 구현해줘
evals.expected_output: generate.mjs structure auth 실행 또는 수동으로 auth.controller.ts, auth.service.ts, auth.module.ts 생성. coding-rules/folder-structure.md 준수, DB snake_case 네이밍

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for backend-dev
Mentions NestJS module structure (controller, service, module)
Mentions generate.mjs or manual file generation

evals.prompt: implement a REST API endpoint for CRUD operations on products
evals.expected_output: Framework auto-detection from package.json, stack-specific test command selection (pnpm test / pytest / go test), controller+service+module file generation, TDD RED->GREEN

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for backend-dev

evals.prompt: 대시보드 레이아웃 컴포넌트를 만들어줘. 사이드바, 헤더, 메인 콘텐츠 영역 포함
evals.expected_output: generate.mjs component 실행 또는 수동 구현. Pretendard 폰트 사용, theme-tokens.md 참조, Tailwind CSS, no useState/useEffect/fetch (no-logic), layout-only props (className, children)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for ui-publish

evals.prompt: create a responsive card grid component with shadcn/ui styling
evals.expected_output: References design/theme-tokens.md and tailwind.config.js for actual token values, mobile-first breakpoints (sm: md: lg:), shadcn/ui component reuse check via CODEMAPS, Pretendard font-family

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for ui-publish
Mentions shadcn/ui component reuse or CODEMAPS check

evals.prompt: 프로젝트 문서를 업데이트해줘. CODEMAPS랑 HUMANMAPS 둘 다 갱신해줘.
evals.expected_output: detect_changes.mjs 실행 -> changes.json 생성, extract_structure.mjs 실행 -> extracted_structure.json, CODEMAPS/INDEX.md + 영역별 .md, HUMANMAPS .html 파일 생성
evals.focus: script pipeline execution and output files

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for doc-update

evals.prompt: generate project documentation for the current codebase
evals.expected_output: detect_changes.mjs and extract_structure.mjs executed in sequence, codemaps/ directory with INDEX.md, humanmaps/ with HTML output, proper service root detection (app/, apps/, src/)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for doc-update
Mentions detect_changes.mjs and extract_structure.mjs in sequence
Mentions service root detection (app/, apps/, src/)

evals.prompt: try-claude 레퍼런스를 최신 플러그인 기본값과 동기화해줘
evals.expected_output: section-aware merge: unchanged sections updated, edited sections preserved. project.json hash comparison (SHA256), managedReferences 배열 업데이트, updated/skipped/reseeded 카운트 보고

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for migration
Mentions project.json hash comparison using SHA256

evals.prompt: sync my local references with the latest plugin defaults
evals.expected_output: Compares SHA256 hashes in project.json, section-level merge preserving user edits, reports counts of updated/skipped/reseeded files, updates managedReferences hashes

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for migration
Describes section-level merge preserving user edits

evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 ESLint, commitlint, husky 설정을 coding-rules 기반으로 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: 9개 coding-rules 문서 읽기, package.json 기반 프레임워크 감지 (Next.js/NestJS/Vite React/React Native/Base TypeScript), 4개 그룹별 승인 워크플로우 (ESLint, TSConfig, commitlint, husky+lint-staged), config 파일 생성

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for init-coding-rules
Describes 4-group approval workflow (ESLint, TSConfig, commitlint, husky+lint-staged)

evals.prompt: set up linting and commit hooks based on our coding conventions
evals.expected_output: Reads all 9 coding-rules docs, detects framework from package.json devDependencies, presents per-group approval (ESLint rules, TSConfig strict, commitlint config, husky hooks), outputs install command without auto-running pnpm add

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for init-coding-rules
Mentions framework detection from package.json devDependencies
Mentions safe install pattern (no auto-run pnpm add)

evals.prompt: plan.md에 정의된 3개 Phase를 worktree 격리 방식으로 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: plan.md의 Branch: 헤더 검증, owner_agent: 별 agents/*.md 존재 확인, git worktree add -b {branch} .claude/worktrees/{branch}, phase별 Agent 호출 (isolation: worktree 금지), phase 완료 후 git merge --no-ff, worktree 정리

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for planner-lite
Mentions Branch: header validation in plan.md
States isolation: worktree is forbidden in Agent calls
Mentions git merge --no-ff after phase completion

evals.prompt: execute the plan at .claude/try-claude/plans/auth-feature/plan.md with worktree isolation
evals.expected_output: Validates Branch: header and owner_agent: fields, checks agents/*.md exist, creates worktree without nesting (no isolation: worktree in Agent calls), sequential phase execution, merge and cleanup

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for planner-lite
Validates Branch: header and owner_agent: fields
Prevents nested worktree (no isolation: worktree in Agent calls)

evals.prompt: 변경된 웹 코드의 접근성을 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: kwcag22.md 읽기, 33개 항목 전수 평가 (KWCAG-01~33 또는 항목 1~33), O/X/triangle/N/A 분류, Playwright 환경 감지 (config/CLI/browser/server 4단계), HTML+CSV 리포트 생성

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for accessibility-review

evals.prompt: run an accessibility audit on the changed files following KWCAG2.2
evals.expected_output: Reads kwcag22.md reference, evaluates all 33 items with auto-detection levels (O/triangle/X), semantic HTML review (7 items: landmarks, sections, interactive, lists, presentational, form grouping, quotations), generates report in .claude/try-claude/reports/accessibility/

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for accessibility-review
Evaluates all 33 items with auto-detection levels

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 보안, 호환성, 코드 품질을 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: BP-01~BP-14 전수 평가: 보안(BP-01 HTTPS, BP-02 취약의존성, BP-03 CSP, BP-04 보안헤더, BP-05 innerHTML), 호환성(BP-06 DOCTYPE, BP-07 charset, BP-08 viewport, BP-09 deprecated, BP-10 passive), 코드품질(BP-11 콘솔에러, BP-12 중복id, BP-13 시맨틱, BP-14 에러처리)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for best-practices
Lists all 14 BP items (BP-01 through BP-14)

evals.prompt: check the changed files for web best practices compliance
evals.expected_output: All 14 BP items evaluated: BP-01 through BP-14 covering Security (5), Compatibility (5), Code Quality (4). Each item with pass/fail/N/A result and specific evidence

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for best-practices

evals.prompt: 변경된 페이지의 SEO 최적화 상태를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: SEO-01~SEO-10 전수 평가: Critical(SEO-01 noindex, SEO-02 title 50-60자, SEO-03 h1, SEO-04 HTTPS), High(SEO-05 meta description 150-160, SEO-06 canonical, SEO-07 JSON-LD, SEO-08 alt), Medium(SEO-09 URL구조, SEO-10 anchor text)
evals.focus: all 10 SEO items with priority levels

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for seo
Lists all 10 SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-10)

evals.prompt: review the SEO status of the changed HTML files
evals.expected_output: All 10 SEO items: SEO-01 through SEO-10 with Critical/High/Medium priority classification, structured checklist with pass/fail/N/A per item

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for seo

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 웹 성능 이슈를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: PERF-01~PERF-11 전수 평가: CRP(PERF-01 render-blocking, PERF-02 fetchpriority, PERF-03 Critical CSS), Image(PERF-04 width/height, PERF-05 lazy, PERF-06 WebP/AVIF), JS(PERF-07 코드스플리팅, PERF-08 트리쉐이킹, PERF-09 레이아웃스래싱), Font(PERF-10 font-display, PERF-11 preload)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for performance
Lists all 11 PERF items (PERF-01 through PERF-11)

evals.prompt: check the changed files for web performance anti-patterns
evals.expected_output: All 11 PERF items: PERF-01 through PERF-11 across CRP/Image/JS/Font areas. Each with specific web performance recommendation, not general code efficiency

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for performance
Focuses on web performance (not general code efficiency)

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 Core Web Vitals 영향을 분석해줘
evals.expected_output: CWV-01~CWV-11 전수 평가: LCP(CWV-01 초기HTML, CWV-02 fetchpriority, CWV-03 폰트차단), INP(CWV-04 시각피드백, CWV-05 지연처리, CWV-06 React.memo), CLS(CWV-07 width/height, CWV-08 동적삽입금지, CWV-09 transform/opacity, CWV-10 폰트교체, CWV-11 공간예약)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for core-web-vitals
Lists all 11 CWV items (CWV-01 through CWV-11)

evals.prompt: analyze the impact on LCP, INP, and CLS for the changed files
evals.expected_output: All 11 CWV items: CWV-01 through CWV-11 with LCP/INP/CLS metric classification, impact analysis per item

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for core-web-vitals

evals.prompt: 변경된 코드에 대해 종합 웹 품질 검토를 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 5개 하위 영역 순차 실행: A-접근성(33항목), B-BP(14항목), C-SEO(10항목), D-성능(11항목), E-CWV(11항목). 통합 HTML+CSV 리포트 생성, output-format.md 준수, 영역별 색상 코딩

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for web-quality-audit

evals.prompt: run a full web quality audit on the current changes
evals.expected_output: Orchestrates 5 sub-skills in sequence: Accessibility (33), Best Practices (14), SEO (10), Performance (11), CWV (11). Generates unified HTML report with section colors (#6c8ebf, #82c882, #f0a830, #e05c5c, #9b59b6) and CSV

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for web-quality-audit
Generates unified HTML report and CSV

evals.prompt: 현재 변경사항을 커밋해줘
evals.expected_output: git status/diff 분석, Conventional Commits type(feat/fix/refactor/docs/chore/test/style): subject-only 포맷, commitlint 검증 시도, 실패 시 amend 루프

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for commit
Describes amend loop on validation failure

evals.prompt: commit this with a proper message following our conventions
evals.expected_output: Analyzes staged changes, generates type: subject format (max 72 chars), attempts commitlint validation, subject-only (no body unless complex)

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for commit
Enforces subject-only format (no body unless complex)

evals.prompt: PR 올려줘
evals.expected_output: Branch 분석, commit history 요약, gh pr create --title --body 실행, Summary/Test plan 섹션 포함
evals.focus: gh CLI execution + PR body structure

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for pr
Includes Summary section in PR body
Includes Test plan section in PR body

evals.prompt: open a pull request for the current changes
evals.expected_output: Analyzes branch diff, generates PR with Summary and Test plan sections, executes gh pr create

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for pr
Generates PR with Summary and Test plan sections

evals.prompt: try-claude 설정은 어떻게 하나요? init-try랑 migration 차이가 뭐예요?
evals.expected_output: .claude/try-claude/ 경로 안내, init-try(초기 설치)와 migration(동기화) 차이 설명, FAQ 기반 답변

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for help-try

evals.prompt: How do I share MCP settings with my team?
evals.expected_output: Explains shared (.mcp.json in repo) vs machine-local (~/.claude/.mcp.json) config, OS-specific template paths

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for help-try
Explains shared (.mcp.json in repo) vs machine-local (~/.claude/.mcp.json) config

evals.prompt: 현재 웹 앱을 탐색해서 E2E 테스트 플랜을 작성해줘
evals.expected_output: planner_setup_page로 브라우저 초기화, browser_snapshot으로 페이지 구조 탐색, 사용자 흐름 매핑, 시나리오별 steps/expected outcomes/success criteria 포함, planner_save_plan으로 specs/ 저장
evals.focus: browser exploration + structured test plan output

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-planner
Mentions browser_snapshot for page structure exploration
Describes user flow mapping with happy path and edge cases
Each scenario includes steps, expected outcomes, and success criteria
Mentions planner_save_plan to save specs/ markdown

evals.prompt: explore the running app and create a comprehensive test plan covering all user flows
evals.expected_output: Browser-based exploration via snapshot/click/navigate, test scenarios with clear titles, step-by-step instructions, expected outcomes, categorized by happy path/edge case/error handling/negative testing, output saved to specs/ as markdown

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-planner
Uses browser tools (snapshot, click, navigate) for exploration
Categorizes scenarios (happy path, edge case, error handling, negative)
Scenarios are independent and can run in any order
Output saved to specs/ as markdown

evals.prompt: specs/ 폴더의 테스트 플랜을 기반으로 Playwright 테스트 코드를 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: generator_setup_page로 브라우저 초기화, 각 시나리오별 실시간 step 실행, generator_read_log로 실행 로그 확인, generator_write_test로 .spec.ts 생성, describe/test 블록 구조, step별 주석 포함

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-generator
Executes each step live in browser before generating code
Mentions generator_read_log to retrieve execution log
Generated code uses describe/test block structure
Includes step comments before each action

evals.prompt: convert the test plan in specs/ into executable Playwright .spec.ts files
evals.expected_output: Reads specs/ markdown, sets up browser per scenario, executes steps live, reads execution log for best practices, writes single-test-per-file .spec.ts with filesystem-friendly names, spec/seed comments at top
evals.focus: file naming + spec reference + best practices from log

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-generator
Reads test plan from specs/ markdown
Single test per file with filesystem-friendly name
Includes spec and seed comments at file top
Applies best practices from execution log

evals.prompt: Playwright 테스트가 실패하고 있어. 디버깅하고 고쳐줘
evals.expected_output: test_run으로 전체 테스트 실행, 실패 테스트별 test_debug 실행, browser_snapshot/console_messages/network_requests로 에러 조사, 근본 원인 분석 (셀렉터/타이밍/데이터), 코드 수정 후 test_run 재검증
evals.focus: systematic debug loop + root cause analysis

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-healer
Mentions test_run to execute full test suite
Mentions test_debug for each failing test
Uses browser tools (snapshot, console_messages, network_requests) for investigation
Performs root cause analysis (selectors, timing, data)
Fixes code and re-runs test_run to verify

evals.prompt: some E2E tests are failing after a UI update, fix them
evals.expected_output: Runs test suite to identify failures, debugs each failure with browser inspection, uses browser_generate_locator for updated selectors, fixes one error at a time and retests, uses test.fixme() for genuine app bugs, sequential MCP tool calls only

expectations.text: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-healer
Fixes one error at a time and retests
Mentions test.fixme() for genuine application bugs
Sequential MCP tool calls (single browser instance)
